news.title: IREDA approved to raise up to ₹29.94B via share sale to strengthen capital.
news.summary: IREDA approved to raise up to ₹29.94B via share sale to strengthen capital.

news.title:
IREDA's board meeting on Feb 6, 2026, to consider raising Rs 2,994 Cr via QIP.
Trading window closed till 48 hours post-meeting; details on IREDA's website.
news.summary:
IREDA's board meeting on Feb 6, 2026, to consider raising Rs 2,994 Cr via QIP.
Trading window closed till 48 hours post-meeting; details on IREDA's website.

news.title: Govt allocates ₹40,064 Cr to IREDA for FY26-27, up from ₹34,730 Cr in FY25-26.
news.summary: Govt allocates ₹40,064 Cr to IREDA for FY26-27, up from ₹34,730 Cr in FY25-26.

news.title:
IREDA's subsidiary Iggelfil approves its first international green energy loan.
This marks a major step in advancing global sustainable energy initiatives.
news.summary:
IREDA's subsidiary Iggelfil approves its first international green energy loan.
This marks a major step in advancing global sustainable energy initiatives.

news.title:
IREDA sanctions its first international loan of USD 22.5M to Swarna Solar Ltd.
The loan supports a 100 MW solar plant in Zambia, boosting global green energy financing.
news.summary:
IREDA sanctions its first international loan of USD 22.5M to Swarna Solar Ltd.
The loan supports a 100 MW solar plant in Zambia, boosting global green energy financing.

news.title:
IREDA disclosed no material deviations in fund utilization for the Dec 2025 quarter.
Funds raised are intended for RE projects and general corporate purposes.
news.summary:
IREDA disclosed no material deviations in fund utilization for the Dec 2025 quarter.
Funds raised are intended for RE projects and general corporate purposes.

news.title:
IREDA exceeded market expectations in Q3, showing strong growth driven by renewable energy investments and improved asset quality.
DMart also reported better-than-expected Q3 performance, surprising investors positively.
news.summary:
IREDA exceeded market expectations in Q3, showing strong growth driven by renewable energy investments and improved asset quality.
DMart also reported better-than-expected Q3 performance, surprising investors positively.

news.title:
Ireda shares rose 4.1% on BSE, hitting ₹142.3 intra-day high.
Q3 results showed 38% PAT growth, 27% revenue increase.
news.summary:
Ireda shares rose 4.1% on BSE, hitting ₹142.3 intra-day high.
Q3 results showed 38% PAT growth, 27% revenue increase.

news.title:
IREDA's Q3 GNPA is expected at 3.75%, improving from 3.97% QoQ.
NNPA for Q3 is projected to drop to 1.68% from 1.97% QoQ.
news.summary:
IREDA's Q3 GNPA is expected at 3.75%, improving from 3.97% QoQ.
NNPA for Q3 is projected to drop to 1.68% from 1.97% QoQ.

news.title:
IREDA Q3 audit reveals 400.24 cr loans in Stage II per court orders.
Capital Adequacy Ratio revised to 15.52%; 9M profit at 1381.36 cr.
news.summary:
IREDA Q3 audit reveals 400.24 cr loans in Stage II per court orders.
Capital Adequacy Ratio revised to 15.52%; 9M profit at 1381.36 cr.

news.title:
IREDA's auditors gave an unmodified opinion on Dec 31, 2025, financials.
Loans of ₹400.2 Cr recognized as standard; CRAR restated to 15.5% per RBI.
news.summary:
IREDA's auditors gave an unmodified opinion on Dec 31, 2025, financials.
Loans of ₹400.2 Cr recognized as standard; CRAR restated to 15.5% per RBI.

news.title:
IREDA's Q3 net profit rose to 5.8B rupees from 4.25B YOY.
Q3 revenue grew significantly to 21.3B rupees from 16.98B YOY.
news.summary:
IREDA's Q3 net profit rose to 5.8B rupees from 4.25B YOY.
Q3 revenue grew significantly to 21.3B rupees from 16.98B YOY.

news.title:
Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency reported Q3 income of ₹2139.6 Cr, PBT ₹716.9 Cr.
Gross NPA stood at 3.2%, Net NPA at 0.8%, and CRAR was 15.5% as of Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency reported Q3 income of ₹2139.6 Cr, PBT ₹716.9 Cr.
Gross NPA stood at 3.2%, Net NPA at 0.8%, and CRAR was 15.5% as of Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
IREDA's Q3 results highlight asset quality and QIP timeline.
The update follows a steady business performance in the quarter.
news.summary:
IREDA's Q3 results highlight asset quality and QIP timeline.
The update follows a steady business performance in the quarter.

news.title:
Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd secured an excellent MoU rating for the 5th consecutive year.
The agency achieved a high score of 96.4/100 for FY24-25, up from 45.8 in FY19-20.
news.summary:
Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd secured an excellent MoU rating for the 5th consecutive year.
The agency achieved a high score of 96.4/100 for FY24-25, up from 45.8 in FY19-20.

news.title:
IREDA's provisional business performance for 2025 shows loan sanctions at ₹40,100 Cr, a 29% YoY growth.
Loan disbursements surged 44% YoY to ₹24,903 Cr, with loan book at ₹87,975 Cr, up 28%.
news.summary:
IREDA's provisional business performance for 2025 shows loan sanctions at ₹40,100 Cr, a 29% YoY growth.
Loan disbursements surged 44% YoY to ₹24,903 Cr, with loan book at ₹87,975 Cr, up 28%.

news.title: Sahaj Solar secures ₹1.25 billion loan from Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency.
news.summary: Sahaj Solar secures ₹1.25 billion loan from Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency.

news.title:
India achieved 50 GW renewable energy capacity in 2025, investing ₹2 trn.
50% of India's power now comes from non-fossil sources, beating 2030 target.
news.summary:
India achieved 50 GW renewable energy capacity in 2025, investing ₹2 trn.
50% of India's power now comes from non-fossil sources, beating 2030 target.

news.title:
IREDA announces senior management changes, appointing Tusarkant Parida as Executive Director and Jagdeep Singh as GM.
Punnu Grover is appointed GM and continues as Chief Compliance Officer until April 2028 or further orders.
news.summary:
IREDA announces senior management changes, appointing Tusarkant Parida as Executive Director and Jagdeep Singh as GM.
Punnu Grover is appointed GM and continues as Chief Compliance Officer until April 2028 or further orders.

news.title: IREDA shares plummet, dropping nearly 60% from their highest point.
news.summary: IREDA shares plummet, dropping nearly 60% from their highest point.
